Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" END * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs LEFT OUTER JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/8c3483d4976c5246dca992a95bab5ae929318c96af3fee80ec83e08d9e2079f3/7d9f7100-0d9c-4c62-a0ab-239de174d884/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
